prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-REVX-DWR10OZ-36215-HPNR Product Type: OUTDOOR_RECREATION_PRODUCT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Revivex Durable Water Repellent (DWR) Spray for Waterproofing, Restoring Performance on Nylon Jackets, Gore-TEX, Paddle, Snow and Camping Gear, Various Description: Restore the protective DWR (durable water repellency) coating on high-tech rainwear or snow gear with Revivex Durable Water Repellent. This spray-on treatment repels water, oil, and stains. It can also be used for tent reproofing.

Over time the DWR of outerwear and camp gear wears off. Regular reproofing treatment of jackets, tents, and other gear is highly recommended. The durable formula creates a water repellent coating that stays on even after a wash. Choose the size that's right for you (10.5 oz or 16.9 fl oz) and ensure peak performance by pre-washing garments with Revivex Pro Cleaner.

This formula is ideal for use on waterproof-breathable fabrics like event®, NeoShell®, and GORE-TEX® fabric. For all types of reproofing projects, use Revivex Durable Water Repellent and get protection all season long. Search Terms: Water Proofing Spray gear repair Aid Revivex Features: - Restore water repellency on GORE-TEX® jackets, bibs, ski pants, gloves, drysuits and waders; add repellency to nylon tent flies, down jackets and backpacks - Apply Durable Water Repellent spray for all-season protection from water, dirt, and stains. 16.9 oz spray can treat 4-6 jackets and 10 oz spray can treat 2-4 jackets. - Maximize breathability and enhance performance of all types of waterproof-breathable fabrics using this DWR spray; also available in 16.9 fl oz bottle - Use the air-powered sprayer to easily disperse every last drop of the PFOA, PFOS and silicon free formula - For best performance, wash first with Revivex Pro Cleaner before applying Durable Water Repellant (DWR) Spray. Packaging may vary. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Revivex Durable Water Repellent DWR Spray 10oz

tokens.name: Revivex Durable Water Repellent DWR Spray

openai.item_name: GEAR AID Revivex Durable Water Repellent Spray 10.5 oz

anthropic.title_differentiation: Restores GORE-TEX And Waterproof Jackets, Tents, Gear, Repels Water And Stains, Treats 2-4 Jackets, PFOA And PFOS Free

openai.title_differentiation: Restores DWR On GORE-TEX And Nylon Gear, Water Dirt And Stain Repellent, PFOA PFOS And Silicone Free
